title: UFOs Are Monitoring Nuclear Bases Globally (Ft. Robert Hastings)
summary: Robert Hastings, author of 'UFOs and Nukes,' discusses decades of documented UFO activity at nuclear weapons sites worldwide. The interview covers witness testimonies from military personnel at bases including Malmstrom, Minot, Ellsworth, and Vandenberg, detailing incidents where UFOs allegedly disabled missiles, interfered with launch systems, and surveilled nuclear facilities from the 1940s through present day.

acronyms.definition: Long-range nuclear missiles capable of traveling between continents
Security screening program for personnel with access to nuclear weapons requiring them to report any issues including medication use
Designated area at military bases for storing nuclear weapons
U.S. domestic intelligence and security service
Military discharge document proving service record

organizations_mentioned: Air Force Office of Special Investigations

events.description: Trinity test - first atomic bomb detonation at Trinity test site in New Mexico
UFO overflights at Hanford plutonium production site, jets unsuccessfully chasing luminous balls of light
Roswell crash at the site of the only nuclear bomber base in the world at the time
Lincoln LaPaz begins studying green fireballs at nuclear facilities in New Mexico
Emergency meeting held on May 5th with AFOSI, ONI, Army Counter Intelligence and FBI to discuss UFO sightings at nuclear bases
First hydrogen bomb test and Washington DC UFO flyover in July
UFO sighting at Savannah River Site on July 19th during the DC flyover period
Operation Castle hydrogen bomb tests with sailors reporting disc and spherical objects hovering over ships
Blue Guild Triple Prime nuclear test at Johnston Atoll where a fiery object allegedly tumbled from the blast plume
JFK reportedly visited Los Alamos in November
Big Sur incident - UFO filmed firing beams at Atlas missile dummy warhead at Vandenberg AFB
UFO incident at Minot Air Force Base where a launch sequence was triggered on a nuclear missile
Malmstrom Air Force Base incident where 10 nuclear missiles were disabled while UFO hovered over front gate
Bentwaters/Rendlesham Forest incident in England involving UFOs over NATO's largest tactical nuclear weapons storage in Western Europe
Large disc-shaped UFO seen hovering over missile base in Soviet Ukraine
UFO sightings and anomalies reported at Malmstrom Air Force Base in January
62 children at Ariel School in Zimbabwe witness UFO landing near uranium mining site
Fukushima nuclear meltdown followed by increased UFO sightings in the area

key_claims.claim: Robert Hastings has personally interviewed 167 employees of nuclear bases across the United States about UFO encounters
A UFO was filmed firing beams of light at an Atlas missile dummy warhead at Big Sur in 1964, and the film was confiscated by CIA agents
Lou Elizondo verified he saw the Big Sur UFO film when he was in charge of AATIP
David Grusch had a colleague check military archives and found radar data confirming an anomalous object paced the warhead in the Big Sur incident
All 10 nuclear missiles at Malmstrom AFB went offline simultaneously while a red glowing UFO hovered over the front gate in March 1967
At Minot AFB in 1966, a UFO triggered a launch sequence on a nuclear missile requiring emergency inhibit switches to prevent launch
Two tactical nuclear bombs were removed from Bentwaters after the 1980 incident and flown to Kirtland AFB for analysis
Jim Penniston was administered sodium pentothal (truth serum) and interrogated by British and Air Force intelligence after the Rendlesham incident
Robert Jacobs' military records were deleted from Air Force databases and his mailbox was blown up after speaking about the Big Sur incident
The CIA's Office of Scientific Intelligence took real UFO investigations underground in 1952 while Project Blue Book served as a psychological operation
UFOs and nuclear secrets are classified under the same protocols
Legacy US UFO programs have used nuclear material or phony nuclear material to bait UFOs to show up
